title: Mastering Design Patterns: Factory and Singleton

questions.sentence: Design patterns provide standardized solutions to common software design problems.
Two critical patterns for managing object creation in JavaScript are the 'Factory' and 'Singleton' patterns.

The Factory pattern involves a dedicated function or class that creates other objects based on specific input, allowing you to centralize object creation logic and decouple it from the rest of the application.
The Singleton pattern, conversely, ensures that a class has only one instance and provides a global point of access to it.
A skilled developer must recognize the specific scenarios where these patterns add genuine value without over-complicating the system architecture.
